title: seal INTERNAL_API_TOKEN for both envs
description:
## Summary
Seals the new `INTERNAL_API_TOKEN` value into `website-secrets` (mentolder + korczewski) and `workspace-secrets`. Required by the website pod and the tracking-import CronJob after PR #562 (unified ticketing) — without this, the website pod will fail to start because `k3d/website.yaml` references `INTERNAL_API_TOKEN` as a non-optional env var from `website-secrets`.

Generated locally with distinct random values per env (96 hex chars each via `openssl rand -hex 48`). Plaintext lives only in `environments/.secrets/{mentolder,korczewski}.yaml` (gitignored).

## Test plan
- [ ] After merge, `task workspace:deploy ENV=mentolder` (and `=korczewski`) rolls successfully and the website pod starts without `CrashLoopBackoff`.
- [ ] `kubectl --context mentolder -n workspace get secret website-secrets -o jsonpath='{.data.INTERNAL_API_TOKEN}' | base64 -d` returns the same value sealed locally.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
